name: 新闻详情
code:
<?php
$id = (int) ($payload['id'] ?? 0);
if ($id <= 0) {
    return ['code' => 422, 'message' => 'id 为必填项'];
}
$tableName = $prefix . '_mc_news_article';
$item = $db->table($tableName)->where('id', $id)->first();
if (!$item) {
    return ['code' => 404, 'message' => '未找到新闻'];
}
return ['item' => $item];
